message:
fix: adjust Spec Evolution Lab padding and fix Portal/AnimatePresence nesting

Spec Evolution Lab:
- Increase top padding from pt-20 (5rem) to pt-24 (6rem) to provide
  slightly more clearance below the fixed site header, preventing the
  top of the hero section from being clipped on viewports where the
  header is taller due to wrapping nav items.

War Stories Map:
- Move <Portal> outside of <AnimatePresence> so the portal is always
  mounted. Previously, <Portal> was a conditional child of
  <AnimatePresence> — when selectedId became null, the Portal itself
  was removed from the tree before AnimatePresence could orchestrate
  the exit animation on the inner motion.div. By keeping Portal
  always-mounted and placing <AnimatePresence> inside it, the exit
  animation on the backdrop/card now plays correctly before the
  overlay content unmounts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
